utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each item includes the necessary details: type, description, and cost (for the first four); the total_budget includes monthly and annual breakdowns, as well as savings information. All items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes four components, all under the 'LifeFirst Standard Package87' branding. In the ground-truth data, the corresponding base plans appear as 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for health and travel, and 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' for property. There is no explicit 'LifeFirst Standard Package87' or 'Umbrella Coverage' entry, but based on naming and context, these map directly to the 'LifeFirst Standard' tier options. Thus, each part of the AI plan aligns with the LifeFirst options with rating 8 for health (physical and mental), 8 for property, and 7 for travel. The 'Umbrella Coverage' under 'additional_services' extends concierge and global services, which are not listed separately, so we treat it as part of the same LifeFirst package family (rating 8 as consistent with LifeFirst tier performance).
